project.name: Nikoo Homes 8
project.publicTitle: Nikoo Homes 8 at Bhartiya Garden Enclave
project.location: Bellahalli, near Thanisandra Main Road, North Bengaluru
project.theme: Garden living inside a modern township
project.priceDisclaimer: Prices, areas, layouts, availability and specifications are indicative and subject to change without prior notice.

hero.headline: A garden-led address designed to keep attention and turn interest into action.
hero.subheadline: Explore a high-design residential launch near Thanisandra Main Road with immersive master planning, elegant floor plans, layered amenities and soft conversion points built for serious homebuyers.
hero.startingPrice: Starting from around Rs. 93 lakh onwards

conversion.heroFormTitle: Request pricing, brochure, or a guided callback
conversion.heroFormNote: Low-friction form for high-intent buyers. Email is optional here; a softer email capture appears later.

softCapture.title: Save this shortlist
softCapture.body: Leave just your name and email to receive plan updates, pricing changes and inventory alerts without a callback.

overview.title: Garden living, now staged like a destination experience
overview.body: Nikoo Homes 8 is best positioned as a garden-inspired community at Bellahalli near Thanisandra Main Road. The strongest, most consistent story across the official and partner ecosystem is not just apartment inventory, but a lifestyle built around community gardens, layered landscapes, club life, sports, family planning and strong North Bengaluru connectivity.
overview.quote: Home is where the garden is.

storyCards.title: Township comfort
storyCards.text: A residential environment that benefits from the wider Bhartiya City ecosystem and North Bengaluru growth corridor.

storyCards.title: Landscape identity
storyCards.text: The project stands apart because the master plan is named and narrated through trails, sensory gardens, aroma gardens, woodland seating and green spines.

storyCards.title: Family flexibility
storyCards.text: The unit mix stretches from compact starter homes to larger family formats, making the page engaging for multiple audience types.

metrics.label: Land parcel
metrics.note: Website-safe wording because public references show both 11.35 and 12 acres.

metrics.label: Scale
metrics.note: Overall development is commonly marketed as 6 towers.

metrics.label: Homes
metrics.note: Overall development is commonly marketed at about 1010 homes.

metrics.label: Floors
metrics.note: Use phase-safe floor references instead of generic high-rise claims.

highlights.title: Why buyers stay longer on this page
items: Garden-led storytelling instead of generic luxury claims
Visible floor plans and a real size spectrum from 501 to 2506 sq ft
Cost-sheet CTAs placed after curiosity-building sections
Location context around Bhartiya City, Manyata, retail, education and airport access
Persistent but non-forced touchpoints for brochure, pricing, WhatsApp and site visit

pricing.title: Enough pricing to qualify a buyer, not enough to create mistrust
pricing.intro: Public pricing varies by source and inventory cycle, so the page should tease the ladder clearly and route high-intent buyers to the latest cost sheet.
pricing.note: Detailed pricing should remain inventory-led and refreshed frequently.

masterPlan.title: The page should sell the landscape vocabulary, not just the apartment count
masterPlan.body: The master plan is where the project becomes memorable. Use the named green experiences as proof that this is more than another North Bengaluru apartment launch.
markers: Black Swan Club and Swimming Pool

amenities.title: Lifestyle that balances wellness, leisure and family convenience

location.title: Location advantage near Thanisandra Main Road
location.summary: The location section should do two jobs at once: create confidence for end-users and reinforce investment logic for enquiry-driven traffic.
quickFacts: Fast access narrative to Manyata, airport and retail corridors

specifications.title: Specification cues that support premium perception

groups.name: Engineering
items: Designed for natural light and ventilation

faqs.question: Where is Nikoo Homes 8 located?
faqs.answer: Bellahalli near Thanisandra Main Road in North Bengaluru, with strong reference points around Bhartiya City and major work, retail and airport corridors.

faqs.question: What are the RERA details?
faqs.answer: Phase 1 is PRM/KA/RERA/1251/309/PR/070526/008628 and Phase 2 is PRM/KA/RERA/1251/309/PR/070526/008629.

faqs.question: What configurations should the website show?
faqs.answer: The most complete public mix runs from Studio and 1 Bed formats through 4 Bed + Staff, with phase-wise availability potentially differing.

faqs.question: What pricing should be shown publicly?
faqs.answer: Use starting price language and keep the latest cost sheet behind a CTA, because published figures vary across sources and inventory changes over time.

faqs.question: What is the main differentiation?
faqs.answer: Garden living. The named green spaces, trails, sensory gardens and club ecosystem give the project a more memorable identity than generic luxury-apartment messaging.

finalCta.title: Keep the final ask simple and high intent
finalCta.body: Offer one last section where the user can choose between price sheet, brochure, floor plans or a guided site visit. It feels consultative instead of pushy, which is stronger for premium residential traffic.

footer.disclaimer: This is a promotional project page built from public project references and the provided data pack. Prices, sizes, layouts, inventory, specifications and possession timelines are indicative and subject to change. Verify all details, promoter naming and current RERA disclosures before publishing live campaigns.
footer.sourceSummary: Content normalized from the official Nikoo Homes 8 page, partner pages, Homz N Space, Housiey and the provided website pack.
